{
  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the primary function of the infrastructure in a data warehousing environment?",
      "options": ["A) To store and manage data", "B) To support the architecture and hardware", "C) To manage database software", "D) To execute C programs"],
      "correct": 1,
      "explanation": "The infrastructure in a data warehousing environment supports the architecture and hardware, providing a foundation for the data warehouse to operate efficiently."
